title: Set up tRPC in a Next.js project
summary: Complete tRPC integration for Next.js App Router — server setup, routers, client hooks, Zod validation, and middleware.
declaration: I will integrate tRPC v11 into this Next.js project using the App Router pattern. This gives you end-to-end type-safe API calls without code generation. If you need REST/GraphQL instead, say so before I begin.
